description: Replace Contentsquare analytics with Microsoft Clarity. Install npm package, configure GDPR consent, custom tags for B2B SaaS, update CSP headers.

userStories.title: Install @microsoft/clarity + env variables
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the Clarity npm package installed and env variables configured so that the app can initialize Clarity.
userStories.notes: @microsoft/clarity v1.0.2 installed. Env var added to .env.local (dev: uga8cs3xrq) and .env.example.

userStories.title: CSP headers: contentsquare -> clarity.ms + c.bing.com
userStories.description: As a security engineer, I want CSP headers updated to allow Clarity domains and block Contentsquare so that Clarity scripts load without violations.
acceptanceCriteria: script-src: contentsquare domains replaced by https://*.clarity.ms
connect-src: contentsquare domains replaced by https://*.clarity.ms https://c.bing.com
userStories.notes: Both CSP blocks (enforced + report-only) updated. Zero contentsquare references remain.

userStories.title: Rewrite analytics hooks for Clarity API
userStories.description: As a product owner, I want analytics-provider to use Clarity.init + ConsentV2, identify hook to use Clarity.setTag + Clarity.identify per page, and remove the now-unnecessary SPA tracking hook.
acceptanceCriteria: analytics-provider.tsx calls Clarity.init(projectId) when consent granted
analytics-provider.tsx calls Clarity.consentV2({ ad_Storage: denied, analytics_Storage: granted })
use-analytics-identify.ts uses Clarity.setTag for custom tags (user_role, subscription_status, subscription_plan)
use-analytics-identify.ts calls Clarity.identify(hashedUserId) per page change
use-analytics-tracking.ts deleted (Clarity handles SPA tracking automatically)
userStories.notes: 3 tags (role, sub status, sub plan) instead of 6 — YAGNI, others not available client-side without extra queries. ad_Storage denied (no ad tracking). pathname dep forces re-identify per navigation.

userStories.title: Cleanup Contentsquare from layout.tsx
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the Contentsquare script removed from the root layout so that no dead analytics code remains.
acceptanceCriteria: Script tag for t.contentsquare.net removed from app/layout.tsx
next/script import removed if no longer used
userStories.notes: Script tag and unused next/script import both removed.
